name: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, free for commercial use. Alternative to Screen Studio with auto-zoom, motion blur, and custom backgrounds.

name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
description: The agent that grows with you — persistent memory architecture for long-horizon task chains. Self-evolution loop writes reusable Markdown Skill files into SQLite after task completion.

name: microsoft/markitdown
description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown format for LLM ingestion. Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML, images, and more.

name: multica-ai/multica
description: The open-source managed agents platform — coding agents that behave like real teammates with defined roles, handoffs, and accountability.

name: openclaw/openclaw
description: Your own personal AI assistant — runs entirely on your devices as a local gateway connecting AI models to 50+ integrations including WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, and iMessage.
